# Local Whisper model notice

- Runtime: `@huggingface/transformers` 3.8.1
- Model: `openai/whisper-tiny`
- Browser ONNX conversion: `onnx-community/whisper-tiny`
- Included weights: q8 quantized encoder and merged decoder
- License: Apache License 2.0

Sources:

- https://huggingface.co/openai/whisper-tiny
- https://huggingface.co/onnx-community/whisper-tiny

The complete Apache License 2.0 text is included in `TRANSFORMERS-LICENSE` in this directory.
